title: Usage Metering Pipeline

activity_flow: Check req.actor present → [missing] throw Error('actor not found in context')
Check appIdOrName present → [missing] return 400 { error: 'appId parameter is required' }
Check appIdOrName is string → [not string] return 400 { error: 'appId parameter must be a string' }
Validate UUID format: starts with 'app-' AND suffix is valid v4 UUID?
[not UUID] → sqlClient.read('SELECT uid FROM apps WHERE name=? LIMIT 1', [appIdOrName])
Guard: check actor is in allowedGlobalUsageUsers → [unauthorized] reject

getActorCurrentMonthUsageDetails: If appId present on actor: filter appTotals to own app + aggregate others
getActorCurrentMonthAppUsageDetails: If actorAppId present and differs from requested appId (and not GLOBAL_APP_KEY): throw Error
getAllowedUsage: Compute remaining = max(0, monthAllowance + purchasedCredits - totalUsed - consumedCredits)
getGlobalUsage: sudo: build keys for all 10,000 shards + legacy unsharded key
Aggregate totals and per-type records across all shards

key_relationships: UsageController depends_on BaseDatabaseAccessService/sqlClient (injected via constructor, used for app name→uid lookup)
branching_conditions: appIdOrName is UUID → use directly; else → DB lookup
actor app scoped → filter appTotals to own app + others

data_stores.DynamoKVStore: Holds per-actor monthly usage, per-actor-per-app usage, global sharded usage, actor app totals, addon credits
data_stores.SQL (apps table): Used only in getUsageByApp for name→uid resolution

important_notes: Global usage sharded across 10,000 keys (murmurhash mod). All KV reads/writes wrapped in SUService.sudo(). Allowance check: subscription monthUsageAllowance + purchasedCredits - consumed. Extension loaded via main.ts; routes registered via controller.registerRoutes().
